variant: compare minoxidil vs finasteride for me — pros and cons of each

request.message: compare minoxidil vs finasteride for me — pros and cons of each

response_body.response: the real move: they work differently. minoxidil is a growth stimulator (blood flow + follicle activation), finasteride is a DHT blocker (stops the hormone that shrinks your hair in the first place). most effective protocols combine both. if you're catching early signs (receding temples, thinning at crown, miniaturization), start both. finasteride stops the loss, minoxidil regrows. you can stack minoxidil with microneedling too for better absorption.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.

options.name: minoxidil
pros: improves blood flow to follicles, stimulates growth
works for early thinning or recession
results visible after several months of consistency
cons: requires ongoing use — stops working if you quit
takes several months to see results

options.name: finasteride
pros: blocks DHT conversion, addresses the hormone actually shrinking follicles
slows loss and preserves existing hair
cons: does not stimulate new growth as aggressively as minoxidil
